[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101100 3
1 11111100 6
2 01001001 3
3 00111100 4
4 00000000 a
5 01101000 3
6 01000000 1
7 10110111 6

01 10 01000000 1 match 6
12 21 00000000 a match 4
23 32 00000101 2
34 43 00001100 2
45 54 00101100 3 match 0
56 65 01001000 2
67 76 00001000 1
70 07 00101000 2

02 20 00100000 1
13 31 01000000 1 match 6
24 42 00100100 2
35 53 01001100 3
46 64 00001000 1
57 75 00111100 4 match 3
60 06 01001000 2
71 17 00000000 a match 4

03 30 01001000 2
14 41 00000000 a match 4
25 52 10110100 4
36 63 01001001 3 match 2
47 74 00101100 3 match 0
50 05 01101000 3 match 5
61 16 01000000 1 match 6
72 27 00110100 3

04 40 00101000 2
15 51 01000000 1 match 6
26 62 00000001 1
37 73 00001100 2
